summary: Exactly one production credential was rotated by the operator: SECRET_002 (the production Postgres role password component of DATABASE_URL), which was the subject of finding P0-001. The rotation was performed by the operator through the Supabase Dashboard, outside this audit execution environment, and the verified evidence is recorded in 10_DATABASE_PASSWORD_ROTATION_EVIDENCE.json. Every other production credential remains NOT_EXECUTED/BLOCKED_PROVIDER_ACCESS for the reasons in 09_DEFERRED_OR_EXCLUDED_ITEMS.json.

production_project.name: AilegalFinalVersion
production_project.observation_method: Management API project and edge-function listing, read-only

rotated_credentials.method: Supabase Dashboard -> Settings -> Database -> Reset database password
rotated_credentials.note: No password or complete DATABASE_URL is recorded here or in the referenced artifact.

not_executed_credentials: All production credentials other than SECRET_002 remain NOT_EXECUTED. The execution environment still has no authenticated write path to any credential provider: no service-role reset, no Supabase PAT issuance, no edge-secret read/write, no Vercel project scope, no GitHub API session, no AI-provider session, no Telegram BotFather session, and no VPS embedding host session. See 09_DEFERRED_OR_EXCLUDED_ITEMS.json and 02_DEPENDENCY_MAP.json (completeness PARTIAL, nine unknown consumers).
credentials_created_scope: SECRET_002 replacement only, operator-side via Supabase Dashboard
consumers_updated: Operator updated the local active DATABASE_URL to the Session pooler form. Other direct-Postgres consumers were not enumerated or updated from this environment; provider-side consumer reconciliation remains blocked.
validations_executed_detail: OLD_DATABASE_PASSWORD_NEGATIVE_TEST (PASS, 28P01) and NEW_DATABASE_PASSWORD_REVALIDATION (PASS, select 1 as ok).
old_credentials_revoked_scope: SECRET_002 old password, rejected with PostgreSQL error 28P01
